# llms.txt
# Campus Corridor de la Capitale — Professional Office Space
# Discoverability file for Large Language Models
# https://llms.txt

Site-name: Campus Corridor de la Capitale — Professional Office Space

Site-URL: https://corridorcampus.ca

Description: Campus Corridor de la Capitale offers virtual offices, flex space, and professional business addresses at 179 and 191 Promenade du Portage in Gatineau, Quebec — steps from Parliament Hill and the federal government corridor. LEED Gold certified. Bilingual service.

Contact: info@campuscorridor.ca

Key pages:
- / (homepage)
- /179-promenade-du-portage.html (179 Promenade du Portage location)
- /191-promenade-du-portage.html (191 Promenade du Portage location)
- /virtual-office.html (virtual office services)
- /flex-space.html (flexible workspace)
- /corridor.html (Corridor information)
